endpoints.name: Returns a paginated list of APPROVED or SUSPENDED apps
endpoints.description:
- Results are paginated and the default is value is 1000 if no limit is provided
- If no query is specified, returns all APPROVED or SUSPENDED apps within the marketplace
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Adds a new app for this developer
endpoints.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly created app
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns a single APPROVED or SUSPENDED app
endpoints.description: - A 'view' event is recorded when trackViews is set to true
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{SAFENAME}} with a real safename.

endpoints.name: Searches through the text of fields to find APPROVED or SUSPENDED apps
endpoints.description: - Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns a paginated list of AppVersions
endpoints.description:
- Results are paginated when limit is set, otherwise all results are returned
- If no query is specified, returns all AppVersions within the marketplace
- Only returns AppVersions owned by this developer
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns a single APPROVED or SUSPENDED app
endpoints.description: - A 'view' event is recorded when trackViews is set to true
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: Removes app and all versions
endpoints.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: Change the live app to another, previously approved version
endpoints.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: Publishes the current working version of the app to the marketplace
endpoints.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer. 
- Only effects the current working version of the app.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid.

endpoints.name: Returns a single AppVersion
endpoints.description: - Only returns AppVersions owned by this developer
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: Updates the app or creates a new version
endpoints.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price and is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly updated app
- This endpoint replaces the entire object to match the request (absolute update). In contrast, the PATCH version of this endpoint updates only the fields provided in the request (relative update).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: Removes AppVersion
endpoints.description: - This method is called on behalf of a developer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: Updates the app fields or creates a new version
endpoints.description:
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
- Price and is required if the model is 'single' or 'recurring'
- Returns the newly updated app
- This endpoint updates only the fields provided in the request (relative update). In contrast, the POST version of this method replaces the entire object to match the request (absolute update).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: Allows a developer or administrator to change the status of apps
endpoints.description: Only certain status changes are allowed. For instance, a developer is only able to suspend and unsuspend their app (which must already be approved). See here for a state change diagram of allowed status changes for administrators: https://support.openchannel.io/documentation/api/#415-apps-status-change
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{APPID}} with a real appid. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version.

endpoints.name: Adds a payment for an app on behalf of a user
endpoints.description:
- Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials 
- Payments must be enabled and 'Custom' must be selected as the gateway in order to use this API endpoint
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{OWNERSHIPID}} with a real ownershipid.

endpoints.name: Fully or partially refund payment for an app on behalf of a user
endpoints.description:
- Results are returned for the market provided within the basic authentication credentials
- Payments must be enabled and 'Custom' must be selected as the gateway in order to use this API endpoint
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{OWNERSHIPID}} with a real ownershipid.

endpoints.name: Returns an event

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{EVENTID}} with a real eventid.

endpoints.description: Returns a paginated list of files
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Uploads a file.
endpoints.description:
- WARNING: File URLs or fileIds must be stored somewhere within the customData field for an app, review, developer or user. Unused files will be removed after a few days. 
- This method is called on behalf of a developer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Get the details for a file.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: A signed URL for downloading a private file can be returned by providing the fileId.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Uploads a file from a URL

- This method is called on behalf of a developer.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD.

- Returns the newly created review

endpoints.name: Update a review from a User and returns the new post

endpoints.name: Return a timeseries for a particular field

endpoints.notes: Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_USERNAME}} with your OPENCHANNEL USERNAME. Replace {{OPENCHANNEL_PASSWORD}} with your OPENCHANNEL PASSWORD. Replace {{PERIOD}} with a real period. Replace {{FIELDS}} with a real fields.
